LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY AND JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 21, 2011 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY, JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, NA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION, 10TH CAUSE OF ACTION, 15TH CAUSE OF ACTION. SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION, 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION, 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION, 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION, 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION, 11TH CAUSE OF ACTION, 13TH CAUSE OF ACTION (TO PLEAD FACTS SHOWING DEFENDANT'S LIABILITY OUTSIDE PURCHASE AND ASSUMPTION AGREEMENT IF CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH). SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 14TH CAUSE OF ACTION, 17TH CAUSE OF ACTION. SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION, 13TH CAUSE OF ACTION (TO ALLEGE FACTS SHOWING ENTITLEMENT TO EQUITABLE RELIEF). SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION, 16TH CAUSE OF ACTION, AND 18TH CAUSE OF ACTION TO PLEAD AS REMEDIES. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, COURT REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-25-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES - ATTY. VICTOR MENG OF MORRISON/FOERSTER LLP, TEL. NO. 268-6560 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.
RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendants JPMorgan Chase Bank and California Reconveyance Company's Demurrer to 1st Amended Complaint is sustained without leave to amend as to the second, third, fourth, fifth, sixth, eighth, eleventh and twelfth causes of action. Sustained with ten days leave to amend as to the seventh, ninth and tenth causes of action to provide plaintiff an opportunity to correct the deficiencies in those claims. The second, third, fourth, fifth, sixth, eighth and twelfth causes of action all relate to alleged wrongdoing that occurred at the origination of the loan, yet neither of the demurring parties are alleged to have been involved in the loan origination and Chase is not liable for any loan origination misdeeds under the purchase and assumption agreement. The eleventh cause of action fails because there is no fiduciary relationship requiring defendants to provide an accounting. The seventh cause of action for quiet title is now insufficient because of the absence of any allegation of tender of the amount due under the loan documents. The ninth cause of action for declaratory relief is based on conclusions without any facts supporting the relief sought. The tenth cause of action is now insufficient because of the absence of any allegation of an offer to restore the consideration received under the loan documents. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077 =302/HEK

MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY, JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, NA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. No appearances. Sustained with leave to amend as to 2nd cause of action, 3rd cause of action, 4th cause of action, 6th cause of action, 7th cause of action, 11th cause of action, 13th cause of action (to plead facts showing defendant's liability outside purchase and assumption agreement if can do so in good faith).
